trivia_bullets.text: First printing, no reprints. Unusual hand-disruption mechanic: exile a nonland card from opponent's hand, but if it's nonblack you must also exile a card from your own hand — rewards mono-black builds.

Flavor text: 'Imagine having your skeleton extracted through your ear, one bone at a time.' —Corliss the Wanderer. Corliss the Wanderer does not appear as a named creature card in ELD — flavor-text-only character. The quote is among the set's most viscerally memorable flavor lines.
EDHREC rank 26,306 — lowest in this batch. Self-exile cost when hitting nonblack cards limits appeal outside mono-black dedicated builds.
Artist Svetlin Velinov, Bulgarian illustrator with a long high-profile MTG run. Screaming hooded figure is characteristic of his dramatic chiaroscuro portraiture style.

related_cards.name: Reaper of Night // Harvest Fear
related_cards.note: Set-mate themed around spectral discard and hand depletion
